entries.source: A clear front that asks one idea.
entries.value: A rõ ràng front that asks one idea.

entries.source: A common trap that warns against a likely mistake.
entries.value: Một bẫy thường gặp cảnh báo về lỗi dễ mắc.

entries.source: A concise back that completes the thought.
entries.value: Mặt sau ngắn gọn hoàn thiện ý tưởng.

entries.source: A hint that helps without giving everything away.
entries.value: A hint that giúp without giving everything away.

entries.source: A review choice so missed cards return sooner.
entries.value: A ôn tập choice so missed cards return sooner.

entries.source: A simple flashcard workflow
entries.value: A đơn giản flashcard workflow

entries.source: A stronger card asks for recall:
entries.value: A mạnh hơn card asks cho recall:

entries.source: A useful card asks one thing. It should not hide five questions inside one prompt. It should be specific enough to answer, but not so narrow that it becomes meaningless.
entries.value: Một thẻ hữu ích chỉ hỏi một điều. Nó không nên giấu năm câu hỏi trong một gợi ý. Nó cần đủ cụ thể để trả lời, nhưng không hẹp đến mức mất ý nghĩa.

entries.source: A weak AI flashcard says:
entries.value: Một thẻ ghi nhớ AI yếu viết:

entries.source: active recall
entries.value: hồi tưởng chủ động

entries.source: Add hints without giving away the answer
entries.value: Add hints without giving away the câu trả lời

entries.source: AI can help make flashcards faster, but the learning still comes from retrieval. If the tool writes the cards and the learner never struggles to answer them, almost nothing has changed. The useful version turns messy notes into focused prompts, then makes the learner recall before revealing the answer.
entries.value: AI có thể giúp làm cho thẻ ghi nhớ faster, but the learning still comes từ retrieval. If the tool writes the cards và người học never struggles to câu trả lời them, almost nothing has changed. The hữu ích version biến messy notes thành tập trung gợi ý, then làm cho người học recall trước khi revealing the câu trả lời.

entries.source: AI can turn rough notes into cleaner retrieval prompts. It can split broad ideas into smaller cards, add examples, and identify traps a learner might miss.
entries.value: AI có thể biến rough notes thành cleaner retrieval gợi ý. It có thể split rộng ideas thành smaller cards, add ví dụ, và xác định traps a learner might miss.

entries.source: AI flashcards and active recall: how to remember more
entries.value: AI thẻ ghi nhớ và ôn nhớ chủ động: cách to remember more

entries.source: apply a concept to a small example.
entries.value: apply a concept to a small ví dụ.

entries.source: Ask for one-idea cards with hints and common traps.
entries.value: hỏi cho one-idea cards với hints và common traps.

entries.source: Back: "Spacing forces memory to reconstruct the answer after some forgetting, which strengthens later recall."
entries.value: Back: "Spacing forces memory to reconstruct the câu trả lời sau khi some forgetting, which strengthens later recall."

entries.source: compare two ideas;
entries.value: so sánh two ideas;

entries.source: define a term;
entries.value: định nghĩa một thuật ngữ;

entries.source: Delete cards that are too broad or obvious.
entries.value: xóa cards that are too rộng hoặc obvious.

entries.source: Do not review everything equally
entries.value: đừng ôn tập everything equally

entries.source: Easy. Push it later.
entries.value: Dễ thôi. Để sau cũng được.

entries.source: explain a cause;
entries.value: giải thích a cause;

entries.source: Flashcards are one of the simplest ways to do this.
entries.value: thẻ ghi nhớ are one of the simplest ways to do this.

entries.source: Flashcards are powerful, but they are not the whole study process. They are best for retrieval, vocabulary, definitions, formulas, distinctions, and key examples. They are weaker when the learner has never understood the idea in the first place.
entries.value: Thẻ ghi nhớ rất mạnh, nhưng không phải toàn bộ quá trình học. Chúng phù hợp nhất cho việc truy hồi, từ vựng, định nghĩa, công thức, phân biệt khái niệm và ví dụ then chốt. Chúng yếu hơn khi người học chưa từng hiểu ý tưởng ngay từ đầu.

entries.source: Flashcards work best when they test one idea at a time, reveal answers only after effort, and review missed cards sooner.
entries.value: thẻ ghi nhớ work best khi they kiểm tra one idea at a time, reveal câu trả lời only sau khi effort, và ôn tập missed cards sooner.

entries.source: For a deeper route, read the Flashcard Builder guide and the Flashcard Builder prompts and study loop. The goal is not a beautiful deck. The goal is remembering more when the notes are gone.
entries.value: Để đi sâu hơn, hãy đọc hướng dẫn Trình tạo Thẻ ghi nhớ và gợi ý cùng vòng lặp học tập của Trình tạo Thẻ ghi nhớ. Mục tiêu không phải là một bộ thẻ đẹp mắt. Mục tiêu là nhớ được nhiều hơn khi không còn nhìn ghi chú.

entries.source: For example:
entries.value: cho ví dụ:

entries.source: Front: "Why does spaced review work better than cramming?"
entries.value: Front: "vì sao does spaced ôn tập work tốt hơn than cramming?"

entries.source: Hard. Review after a short delay.
entries.value: Hard. ôn tập sau khi a short delay.

entries.source: Hint: "Think about forgetting and retrieval."
entries.value: Hint: "Think về forgetting và retrieval."

entries.source: Hints are useful when they preserve effort. A bad hint is the answer in disguise. A good hint narrows the search space.
entries.value: Hints are hữu ích khi they preserve effort. A bad hint is the câu trả lời in disguise. A good hint narrows the search space.

entries.source: identify a common mistake;
entries.value: xác định a common mistake;

entries.source: If a card keeps failing, do not only repeat it. Ask why it is hard. Use Socratic Instruction to uncover the misconception, Math Step Coach for procedural gaps, or the AI learning prompt library to find a better study prompt.
entries.value: If a card keeps failing, đừng only repeat it. hỏi vì sao it is hard. Use Hướng dẫn Socrates to uncover the hiểu lầm, Huấn luyện viên Từng bước môn Toán cho procedural gaps, hoặc the AI learning thư viện gợi ý to find a tốt hơn study prompt.

entries.source: inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed around that active recall loop: build a deck, try the front, reveal the answer, rate your recall, and review the misses until the idea sticks.
entries.value: của inspir Trình tạo Thẻ ghi nhớ is designed xoay quanh that ôn nhớ chủ động loop: xây dựng a deck, try the front, reveal the câu trả lời, rate của bạn recall, và ôn tập the misses until ý tưởng sticks.

entries.source: Missed. Review soon.
entries.value: Missed. ôn tập soon.

entries.source: One mistake learners make is treating every card the same. If you know a card instantly, reviewing it again tomorrow may waste time. If you miss a card, waiting a week may be too long.
entries.value: Một lỗi người học hay mắc là đối xử với mọi thẻ như nhau. Nếu bạn biết ngay một thẻ, ôn lại vào ngày mai có thể lãng phí thời gian. Nếu bạn trả lời sai một thẻ, chờ một tuần có thể là quá lâu.

entries.source: Pair flashcards with understanding
entries.value: Pair thẻ ghi nhớ với sự hiểu biết

entries.source: Paste a small chunk of notes into Flashcard Builder.
entries.value: Paste a small chunk of notes thành Trình tạo Thẻ ghi nhớ.

entries.source: Photosynthesis: the process plants use to make food.
entries.value: Photosynthesis: the process plants use to làm cho food.

entries.source: Rate recall honestly.
entries.value: Rate rectất cả honestly.

entries.source: Reading notes feels productive. Remembering them later is the real test.
entries.value: Reading notes feels productive. Remembering them later is the real kiểm tra.

entries.source: remember a sequence;
entries.value: ghi nhớ một chuỗi;

entries.source: Review without looking at the back.
entries.value: ôn tập without looking at the back.

entries.source: Strong cards often include:
entries.value: Thẻ tốt thường bao gồm:

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: kỹ năng học tập

entries.source: That hint helps the learner start without removing the act of remembering. inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed for this reveal-and-rate loop: try first, reveal second, rate honestly, then bring weak cards back sooner.
entries.value: That hint giúp người học bắt đầu without removing the act of remembering. của inspir Trình tạo Thẻ ghi nhớ is designed cho this reveal-và-rate loop: try first, reveal second, rate honestly, then bring weak cards back sooner.

entries.source: That is why active recall matters. Instead of looking at the answer, you try to pull it from memory. The effort strengthens the memory and reveals what still needs work.
entries.value: That is vì sao ôn nhớ chủ động matters. thay vì looking at the câu trả lời, bạn try to pull it từ memory. The effort strengthens the memory và reveals điều gì still needs work.

entries.source: The learner still has to do the remembering. That is the point.
entries.value: người học still has to do the remembering. That is the point.

entries.source: The second card makes the learner retrieve a relationship, not simply recognize a sentence. Good cards usually focus on one of these jobs:
entries.value: The second card làm cho người học retrieve a relationship, không simply recognize a sentence. Good cards usually focus on one of these jobs:

entries.source: This does not need to be complicated. The important part is that your review schedule responds to memory instead of treating the deck like a static list.
entries.value: This không need to be complicated. The important part is that của bạn ôn tập schedule responds to memory thay vì treating the deck like a static list.

entries.source: Try it in Flashcard Builder. If you need to understand the topic before making cards, start in Learn Anything. If you want pressure after reviewing cards, move into Quiz Me On Trivia or Viva Practice.
entries.value: Try it in Trình tạo Thẻ ghi nhớ. If bạn need to understand chủ đề trước khi making cards, bắt đầu in Học Bất cứ Điều gì. If bạn want pressure sau khi reviewing cards, move thành câu đố Me On Trivia hoặc Luyện vấn đáp.

entries.source: Turn notes into better cards
entries.value: biến notes thành tốt hơn cards

entries.source: Turn repeated misses into a question for Learn Anything.
entries.value: biến repeated misses thành a câu hỏi cho Học Bất cứ Điều gì.

entries.source: Use this loop:
entries.value: Dùng vòng lặp này:

entries.source: Use three ratings:
entries.value: Dùng ba mức đánh giá:

entries.source: What is the role of chlorophyll in photosynthesis?
entries.value: điều gì is the role of chlorophyll in photosynthesis?

entries.source: What makes a good flashcard
entries.value: điều gì làm cho a good flashcard

entries.source: When you paste notes into AI, ask it to split broad ideas into those jobs. A deck with 18 specific cards is usually better than a deck with 5 giant cards that each contain a whole paragraph.
entries.value: khi bạn paste notes thành AI, hỏi it to split rộng ideas thành those jobs. A deck với 18 cụ thể cards is usually tốt hơn than a deck với 5 giant cards that each contain a whole paragraph.

entries.source: Where AI helps
entries.value: nơi AI giúp
